title: Battle of Kalaan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev= |conc= |next=[[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' |image=[[File:Kalaan_battle.jpg]] |name=Battle of Kalaan |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=c. [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' shows the Battle of Kalaan taking place just before the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]]. [[Brenn Tantor]] is promoted as an officer on Kalaan and is sent to Tatooine for training. Moreover, [[Dellis Tantor]] is injured on Kalaan and has not yet recovered from his injuries when Imperial forces arrive on Tatooine. |place=[[Kalaan City]], [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] |result=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] victory;''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' Kalaan City destroyed |side1=Galactic Empire |side2=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Beri Tulon]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*5 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] *[[Theta-class barge/Legends|''Theta''-class AT-AT barges]] *[[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing crafts]] *[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA walkers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] **[[Cattena Squadron]] |forces2=*[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] *[[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]] *[[T3-B heavy attack tank]]s *[[T1-B hovertank]]s *[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *[[Kalaanite]]s |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Moderate to heavy |casual2=*Near Annihilation of forces |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Just keep your head down out there, Dellis. I've gotten used to having you around.''"
"''Thanks for the vote of confidence, Brenn.|[[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Dellis Tantor]] preparing to deploy for the battle|}} A '''battle''' took place shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]]. ==Build-up== The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had established a base on the world, taking up refuge among the [[Kalaanite]]s in [[Kalaan City]]. Learning of [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan's]] connection to the Rebellion, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commanders planned to subjugate the planet and root out any Rebel presence. A task force of five [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] arrived in orbit above the planet deployed a cloud of dropships, mostly [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing crafts]] and [[Theta-class barge/Legends|''Theta''-class AT-AT barges]]. Emerging from the drop ships was a combined force of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]], [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] and [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], with [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] providing combat support. ==The battle== [[File:Kalaan_battle2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T1-B hovertank|hovertanks]] engage [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]].]] The columns of Imperial armor closed on the city. Some distance out, they were met by skirmish line of [[T1-B hovertank]]s. The hovertanks proved no match for the AT-STs and AT-ATs until the heavier [[T3-B heavy attack tank]]s rolled over a ridge to support them. Combined with air support from [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]], the Rebels were able to put a dent in the Imperial columns. Despite the temporary halting of the Imperial force, the Rebels' efforts were to no avail, and the city fell to the Empire. Squadrons of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] demolished the city, leaving mostly rubble. In the aftermath of the battle, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squads combed the ruins of the city. On one such patrol, a unit of [[Cattena Squadron]] had its sergeant killed, at which point [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Brenn Tantor]] took command. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Beri Tulon]], scouting the battlefield for talented commanders to put to use in the [[Battlefield Holographic Control Interface|BHCI]] program, took notice of Tantor's performance. ==Aftermath== Tulon met Tantor's squad in time to see Brenn tending to his brother [[Dellis Tantor|Dellis]], who had been shot by a [[Kalaanite]]. Tulon promoted Brenn to [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and pulled him for the project. Dellis came along to receive medical attention. As a result of the battle, the Empire took control of the planet, built a [[Kalaan prison|prison]], and stripped much of it of vegetation, feeding the resentments of the [[Kalaanite resistance]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 0 BBY}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Kalaan |es=Batalla de Kalaan |pt=Batalha de Kalaan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kalaan, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Kalaan]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
